title: EDEN GARDEN
lyrics:
1. Amei kapyi Bangpii datei nang gongroupo? Edenki teito kaleimei, Ringkiih takle kavai namki. Maning makaang keikapyi Pumpiigo Ntahsa koilei, Halleluyah latlei, Halleluyah koikapyi Pumpii gongtak.

2. Zionki sagong Pumpii kadipii gotei, Meihangna maning makaangle, Ahtei mahum tamwolakle.

3. Koikapyi piikeetei gongliit kasu katang, Dwina kalongtei kumpiina, Teito ntah njoitangle.

title: YOU MUST BE BORN AGAIN
lyrics:
1. Tingneika tinghum ninaki, Nicodim Jesuda gongle Jesuna Ahkuka tamle, Nang manaloi keilo. Nang nleisa manaloilo (2times) Sating sazyi douni dichii manaloilo, Nang nleisa manaloilo (2 times) Sating sazyi doutang karam manaloilo.

2. Kalui tinglang teigong leitak, Chiilung leimikdo luilei tak, Lungkasyi mei malum wolo, Kamyi gong kasuki.

3. Lungkasyi mei eitoi nangna, Kemkito nlum leikido Makumsupii tam mpatlo Pumpii Jesu doika.

4. Pumkito kalungtei pumle, Rangiina kalung rangiile, Kalui gahsa lungtang karam, Nang manaloi keilo.

5. Lungkasyi mei eitoi katang, Mana loisupii leidichii, Mage marii kagong kaktei, Mana loiwo lakle.

title: JERUSALEM
lyrics:
1. Jerusalem abam kabi Zion Martyre teinei rangii kamateihang Kabi katchiimei Pumpii doito, Bamhum tangle leimik liitkasu bamto. Halleluyah dikaki Pumpiile, Halleluyah amen halleluyah, Meihanggo tchiimatei tangkaram, Gongleitak Emmanuel halleluyah.

2. Sating gamto Pumpiina humpyisa, Kemjaangpii zaipatpyi Calvaryto, Patkapyi zaipii kem gahpyile Halaangle Emmanuel halleluyah.

3. Pumpiigo kadoutang karam meihang, Sating gam jubilee halleluyah, Pumpiigo meihangna halaangle, Tammatoilo sagoi kaki hosanna.

4. Jerusalem Moses song dikaki, Jerusalem kito dikakipii, Sagong zheito kagong hangtoilo, Messiah kadousa latlo hosanna.

title: YOUR LIFE
lyrics:
1. Goh chiilungki tomage doutangle, Katutei I maning makle, Sazyi poumah ntah rangaa fiisa, Kempui diki Itat tutakle. Pumpii nang shiipyilo, Ina ratasa kaang kaleitei I puhnglaksa leile, Goda gongleile kem gaapyilo, Pumpii I kamage takle.

2. Neika jaangpii sazyi pouryi humle Pumpii jaangpii magelesa Kabingam tei mahkado tchiimakle, Pumpii kupichii dapei ketang.

3. Lungpat kalei chiilung ei maningki, Dakumpiina lungpat tangpo? Maning gongki tinglang tei naleitak, Eitoina I dapei tchiitangpo.

title: ALL MINES ARE THINE
lyrics:
1. I tingtang sekchii Pumpii teihsui tangle, Pumpiiwo Igo male, Puidito tatsa kaleikak koukido, Pumpiiwo Igo male. Tingkei tingrot gongkido Jesuma, Tinglang kashyi gongkido goma, Tinglang kaleitaa I goma tangle, Pumpiiwo Igo male.

2. Sazyi pouryi meina n'goh ngouroudo, I ei Pumpii gomale, Kangmeina n'goh heirousa tukido, I ei Pumpii gomale.

3. Sazyi pouryi bamhangki roitat kido, I ei Pumpii gomale, I teikido ringkido goma tangle. I ei Pumpii gomale.

title: JESUS IS COMING SOON
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pouryi meilung kasyipii tokryisa, Pungsa kaleikito tchiimatei pyi, Kalak kaniih gahpyi Pumpiigo malummei, Tulo Christian mei kasang puidiki. Jesu nleigong tang tinghumme tingnaa me, Bwika kakong shiikahum piineitei, Kataimei ringkiitang tinggamto kadoutang, Katai kachiih gahle sating gamtei.

2. Sazyi pouryi ntah ralehtei gahtangle, Pumpii samsui kasu meido gahtang, Jesu nlei gongtang bwika kachem heisa, Kamaa kagahmei satinggam pitang.

3. Nyi koumei satinggam pikalu piineitei, Kalak kaniih gahsa ntak doutang. Satinggam pitutang sazyi pouryi toisa, Nyi koumei ntaktang Pumpii dato.

title: JESUS IS CALLING
lyrics:
1. Sazyipou kalak kamage mariimei, Gonglo Jesuna latleile, Sazyi pouna tchiiwo kalak kamage, Poimaang pyinesa koileile. Goma kamage marii pungsa, Gonglo Jesu gonglo Jesuda Ahna koileile nang gongnyi makpo nang, Ngo kasagah pyitangle.

2. Gonglo lung kamage marii meihang tei, Gonglo Pumpiina latleile, Latkalei koitei datchiisa shiiroupo, Lat monoisa latsa leile.

3. Kemlungto puidi tchiimagasa kalei, Gonglo Pumpiina latleile, Nang dajaangpii teituito satsa leipo? Gohlung hangkapii magele.

title: THE LORD DAY IS COMING
lyrics:
1. Gungkiih wode Christian meihang tei, Tingkum tinglangtei gonglei takle, Rangiima saryinat keisana, Kashyi kahemgotei saryi tchiitude. Taisa kaleimei, jyisa kaleimei, Nang jyijao tangpo, nang hingmakpo nang, Sazyipou tinglang nagong leitakle, Jyisana kaleimei hangteina Gungkii sanii ngamtei tchiitude Pumpiina latkagongki Nyihangna koisa leide.

2. Gungkii wode Christian meihang tei, Taanglak takle sazyipou tinglang, Sazyi meina tchiikabam hangtei, Pumpiina jugong kasang humlei takle.

3. Risana kava kagong meitei, Meikado latsang latpyi lakle, Risa kagong tinglang gahtakle, Pumpiina latsa kaleikak tattude.

4. Kahemna saryi tangtang pangsa Meigo hemtang karam tuhtakle, Nyido rangii baitui poisana Ahnyigo ngamkabui saryi tchiitude.

title: SAUL, SAUL, WHY DO YOU PERSECUTE ME
lyrics:
1. Christian meigo tchiikamage Saul, Pumpii raa karii tei gonglei tak, Damaskas puidi kiteito, Pumpiina ahgo samtak tchiile. He Saul (2 times) sa latgong leitak, Pumpii Jesu nang tahpiipo? Nangna ratkalei Jesu teile. Roktei saagong leitak.

2. Teiki Saultei Paul lattakle, Gungtuhsa namkitei tattuhle, Gokem hangtei gahpyi takle, Sampao kabitei tamtat tulo.

3. Teikito Paul lungkali takle, Ahna tchiimage kalei meida, Pumpii sampao tei tampyile, Mei kamoilam lungkali takle.

4. Kasang Paulna tamkapyi paito, Romeki sagong Nero raariile, Ahparyi samtak tei tchiile, Kaang taang teipii pyidang eitakle.

title: THE VIRGINS AND THIER LAMP
lyrics:
1. Bibleki raliimei naa kyarii rasamtei, Mangiina tchiidaale mangiina tchiidaa mak. Tchiidaa kalumei mangiima meedwitei lei, Tchiidaa kasumei marong papoi. Manang leitak tchiidaa wolo, Tingchoime tingna me tinghume Sazyipou ryimeina tinglangtei timakle, Tinglangtei nang koisa leidilo.

2. Raliimeinaa mangiina mangii gotamle, Gonyima meedwitei nyigodo seilosa Teikiteito raliimeina mangiina tam, Gonyido kajoinito lyilo.

3. Teikiteito raliimei mangiina tuhtak, Pumpiina kikumtei kumsa latpyimakle, Teikiteito ahnyina kikum kakiile, Pumpiina ahnyigo latpyimak.

title: YOU MUST BE BORN AGAIN
lyrics:
1. Lungkali loikasu meiteina, Sating gamtei piwolakle, Jesu Khrista natam John gospel hangtum verse hangtum ki. Kamalum mei karing doutangle, doutangle. Kalui gahsa karing sating gamto, Malum mei doutangle.

2. Bwipot poisa teilam kajumei Meitei satinggam piwolak, Jesu Khrista natam, Luke Bible kito tambamsa lei.

3. Cross pungsupo dichii meikado, Sating gamtei piwolakle, Jesu Khrista natam, Mathew Bible kito tamkabam.

4. Sating kataa Pumpii teihsui tang Pumpii Ahteih tei suitangle, Ahda pikasuta Gorangii matei kasuipyilo.

title: SEND THE GREAT REVIVAL
lyrics:
1. Mangpyilo keikapyi Pumpii goma kavaitei, Sazyi pouryi matum revival patmatude. Pumpii maangpyilo revival. Maangpyilo revival (2 times) Pumpii maangpyilo revival. Godato patmatulo.

2. Ngoukahing meebam kiteito mpatpyilo, Keipyilo Pumpii teimahum teipiina n'goh.

3. Keipyilo nyihango kahem baiki teito, Lungsyi pyilo tikabui teimahum tei pyilo.

4. Kahem lyigo ngamkabui atei mahum pyilo, Alu myikalei rhiibwitei poikoitang karam.

title: OH LORD LOVE ME
lyrics:
1. He Pumpii Jesu lungsyi pyilo, Kamyi kemkito leidile, Goh chiilung puidi myi eitakle, Go kavai teimangou pyilo. Kangmei teina kavai kitolei, Ntahpii tokryitakle kangmei, Mage chiilung kito kalei Iroile, He Pumpii goh kasui pyilo.

2. Sazyi pouryi tatsa leikido, Rangiima kamarei ngamtei, I na ka ntah dou kasuki, Go chiilung teimyi leitakle.

3. He Pumpii Jesu gobamkito, Tinglang taangtakle dii kalei, Pumpii Igoda liitlei takle, Goh chiilung matumpii suine.

title: AWAKE, AWAKE CHRISTIAN
lyrics:
1. Tuhlo, tuhlo Christian meihang Zyi katuting taang tak Nlum nitakle gorangii Kem puidi tatsulo. Rangii puidi kasang fiilo, Kamyilam tatsulo Tinghum tinglang teitaang takle, Kavai humlei takle.

2. Tuhlo, tuhlo gopwi gopfii Gongkiih tusudepo? Gorangii hatsa leitakle Taksupii ratalo.

3. Tuhlo, tuhlo kanghe meihang Zang kajyi satinggam, Neika madou supii gongtang, Ngoukarou tchiisulo.

4. Tuhlo, tuhlo kangsana mei Pumpii ngamtei tchiilo, Satan teina hemsa leile, Rata mangai sulo.

title: IN THE NAME OF JESUS
lyrics:
1. Jesu jaangpii magemei neika ntah tangle Jesuna kamuito satsa laang kajeipiinei, Mikdwi kapatdo mage mariido gatangle. Kasang katchii meitei nasatoi doutangle. Laang dousana… Laang dousana Jesu zheito… Jesu zheito. Nga ngaasana kagong piinei, Kamagetei tchii ntahpyi, Mpou poumah mpou poumah Doukalu kavai pyi.

2. Kasang kasu meihang kalangsa manaloilo, Jesuna kamuito satsa samtak katchiiki, Mikdwi piina tokryisa jumakii paiwolak. Go chiilung mataapii gahtanglesa hingle.

3. Sazyi pouto kahat meisating to ntahtang, Jesuna kamuito satsa latkagong piinei, Mikdwi kapat mage marii humtei gahtangle. Gongam kalui piinei golaang poigong pyitang.

title: SINNERS LIFE
lyrics:
1. Kem chiilung ei mangaiwo lak, Kashyi ngamtei tchiiloi nyi Pumpii kasui kapyi mangei, Ningkamki tokatat mei. Kadazii kapii lungsyipo Kamage chiilung kito. Malum kasumei rangiitei, Cannan sazyiki latlak.

2. Kinapwi katchii teimarei, Kamage chiilung marei, Pumpiina lungsyi pyisana Koikapyi teimaning mak.

3. Madat kalei teimahum tei, Titakle mangei loilak, Latkalu meitei moikido Kalei kalumei moimak

title: HEAVENLY HOME
lyrics:
1. Sating gam nyibam jaang teipiina, Tchiidaa nesa Pumpii tuhtakle. Lungkasyi sazyi pouryi, Satoi kapyi jaangpiina, Ntah rangaa lii tchiisa leitangle Tingnei ting… hum tchiimak, Sating gam… bamkitei, Swikasyi do gahle Teibam kitei neika gongtangle.

2. Nyijaangpii Jesuna taipyile, Nyi rangii kazangjyi doutangle, Kem kamaa sazyi pouryi, Gotei majuwo sana, Sating gamtei kiihsa lungtu tangle.

3. Sating kataa nyi Pumpii teina, Koipyi jupyi sanii leitangle Kalui kagah tchiisupii, Pumpiina koipyi tangle, Ngou karou katai kachiih gahtangle.

title: I AM COMING TO THE LORD
lyrics:
1. Kem kapungpii Ina,, Khristada gong leile Tinglang tei Ina tiwolak Juhpyilo he Pumpii. Khrista nalung kasyi, Tei I malum dichii Ahdato lungtangle Khristada Ina gongleile lungsyisa poiseilo.

2. Kamasui kempot tei, I na pungsa leile, Gohkem potmasui tei nangna, Poitoi seilo Pumpii.

3. Tahjaangpii Khrista tai? Tahjaangpii zai patpo? Mage pyitang karam jaangpii, Khristana taipyile.

title: JOSEPH’S SONG
lyrics:
1. Haa kareiki Jacob teina Bangpiigo malumsa lungle, Naa kyariisa naka lungle, Jacobna Josephgo lunsyi. Josephgo sanamei hangteina, Ngourousa Egypt namki joile, Josephna Reubengo latle, Reubenna mbeisa hatle.

2. Song katingmeina Joseph go, Kuilung kitei toikei takle, Reubenna Joseph go juhle, Joseph go lungsyisa hatle.

3. Song katingmeina Joseph go, Ngourousa kaset pyitakle, Joseph go sana makei joi, Josephna Bangpiigo rata.

4. Song katingmei teina pfiigo, Nlei gongsa chiihsa tamle, “Joseph taitaklesa tampyi” Sanamei hang rashii tchiile.

title: YOU WILL BE SAVED
lyrics:
1. Kem kapungmei golungtei tchiimatei wolo, Rangii kamateigo bam pyilo, Tinglang gahtakle eitoi liitpyilo Golungki rangiitei liitnesa koileile. Rangii gotei maliitlo. Nang karing teidoutangle. Rangiitei maliitlo golung mateisana.

2. Khrista rangii kagah pumrongtei taitangle. Kamatei rangiigo maliitlo, Kamajung ntah rangaa doutangle, Golung latsa rangii maliitlo koileile.

3. Rangiigo maliitlo golungtei vaitangle Kalak kaniihdo gahtu tangle, Golung latpyilo rangii mateigo, Nang taikido ringloitang rangii maliitlo.

title: THE SORROW DAY
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pouryi myi eitakle, Katik kamong chyimei meile, Leimik kavaido gaatakle, Kii kapat kamadat tchiile. Naa Jesu Cross kito katei, Pwi takou datsa hatleile, Jesu jupung masuk takle Kii kapat kamadat tchiile Juhlo gokem jaangpiinale.

2. Cross gamto longkahum zaipii, Sazyi pouryi kem gahpyile, Tupyihung pung ngiijum pungsa, Taipyile Jesu khristana.

3. Kangou meihang kii pattakle, Kalak kaniih jupei lakle, Pyibaiki jotpyi jumpungsa, Taipyile Jesu khristana.

4. Malumlo sazyi pouryi mei, Calvary zang Cross paryito, Daziika mage lepyipo? Gokem jaangpii taipyi takle.

title: NEW SOUL IN YOUR LIFE
lyrics:
1. Gohato rangii doumakle Teihkapat kito maninglo, Nrii gongsa juhgong kido, Lungsa kalei teiriimaale. Oh, Kamachiile laksa katchii, Mahatsa maangrousa maangsu takle, Karachet tinglang gongtakle, Kagum toitang legorangii.

2. Ahmah kanitei meebamki, Maning gonglo Pumpii jaangpii, Ngamtei mahkado tchiimakle, Christian meinii teikum tangle.

3. Meilui kalung jeipa ryito, Mpongsa kalung kumtakle, Ringkalei kak lui maroulo. Ralisupii rachet makle.

2. Ahmah kanitei meebamki, Maning gonglo Pumpii jaangpii, Ngamtei mahkado tchiimakle, Christian meinii teikum tangle.

3. Meilui kalung jeipa ryito, Mpongsa kalung kumtakle, Ringkalei kak lui maroulo. Ralisupii rachet makle.

title: CALLING BY GOD
lyrics:
1. Pumpiina kalat koishiilo, Sazyi pouryi mei, Gongtang karam naleitakle, Gongam teisang mak. Gongsek tang halleluyah, Gongsek tang Pumpii Jesu, Kamong kito tongsa, Ahtei mahumtei mangou tangle.

2. Ahna kalei katu tinglang, Kahum piinei tei, Taikalei mei ahnyi teina Kamage doune.

3. Meebamki kalei meiteina, Tingkum tang kyarii, Ahchiilung mage doutangle. Ringnido ringlak.

title: WORLDLY KNOWLEDGE IS NOTWANTED
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pouryi kati kangou kani kahiigo marei lakle, Pumpii mah lungkasyii teihtei suitangle. Ina kempungsa leikido Ahna Gohjaangpii Crossto taipyi, Eitoina goh ei maipyisa lutakle. Mangou pyilo gohmah chiilung Kasang puidiki teito, Tattang karam gohchyitat pyilo Ina sazyi pouryi kahum, tei marong piina humle, Pihtangle sating gamtei.

2. Sazyi pouryi kalak kaniihtei Ina lyikalukum takle, Tinglang kataangka kempuidi ki tatsa, Teichii kido magaapyilo Pumpii I gotei suihum tangle. Ringkalei tatei Pumpii teisui tangle.

3. Sazyi pouryi kangmei hemei matum piina nnou ei kido, Satinggam kamwi kiteito koitangle, Lungkasyi kangmei hemei matumpii, ntahsa kadoutangle, Kalui tchiisupii Pumpii go kasui tang.

title: MEN WITHOUT KNOWLEDGE
lyrics:
1. Lung teihsa kaleimei gonyi, Tinglang tei nalei takle, Nang datchii sanii rileipo, Tinglangna gokoi makle. He Pumpii tingnei leimik Goh chiilung ei poipyilo Ameepa n'go rutangle Manasa teimak dichii.

2. Kacheng kadi matum gotei, Pumpiina sam tchiitangle. N'go sam tchiikatu piinei, Nang dapei samtam tangpo?

3. John hangtum hangtum kitotam, Pumpiina eitchiisa tam, Manaloi kasu meiteina, Satinggam sazyi ngoulak.

4. Pumpiigo ngou karou meitei, Tamwokalak kamage, Gii kaget sanii letangle. Kalui tchiikasu meebam

title: WONDERFUL GRACE OF JESUS
lyrics:
1. Gokem sating gamto fiidichii, Sattangle samkatchii piineitei, Ipakwo lakle Pumpii dato. Goh keipyitang karam taleipo? Madatle Pumpiima lungkasyi, Fiisana gohkem ei gapyile, Goh ei lungkasyipii mpatpyi Jesugo malum meigo keipyi.

2. Jesu Cross gamto kemjaangpii tai, Kem katchii nyihang jaangpiinale, Ahna keipyile kemmei hanggo, Jesu roile nyigo keikapyi.

3. Sagoi kaki bamtei bamsana, Kacheng kaditei tchiisupiina, Sazyi pouryi nyimei hang gotei, Samtchii tangle kalui piineitei.

title: CITY OF HOLYNESS
lyrics:
1. Sanapii katchiinam kamatei leile, Keikapyi meitang tang leile, Pumpii Jesugo alii tchiisa tammatoi, Pumpii bamkito bamsa. Oh, daziika madatpo. Teiki kalak kaniih gah, Oh, namdi kabikitei Ido bamnile Pumpiikee latpyilo Ido teiki lungne.

2. Sazyi pouryi ei mbiroi roi leile, Teikitei ntah ntahsa Karyi ei kaisekchii Pumpiigo ngoutangle. Teikito ntah tangle.

3. Kamyi teina n'goh baangneiwo kido Jesuna n'goh keipyitang Pumpii jaangpii laksa ngam katchii meigotei, Karing pyihung keipyine.

title: TELL THE GOOD NEWS
lyrics:
1. Pumpii mahsam kabi jeipyilo, Goh tchiikapyi maning gongsana, Pumpii mahlung kasyi kasang sam, Godato samtei timatulo. Pumpiina tamle Ahmah samkabi, Sazyi pouryi maangsa tampyilo. Ntah rasam Pumpii Jesuma. Nyihanggo kasui pyisa leile.

2. Azang ningkam maangsa jeipyilo. Pumpiina katei gotei ngamsa. Nyihang kemtei poitoi pyitakle. Tampyilo abam hangki teika.

3. Pumpiina Jaonah meihang gotei, Pangtang karam jaangpii gongtangle. Tinglang teina naagong leitakle, Pumpii jaangpii nyi ngam tchiitude.

title: GOD’S CREATURE ARE TELLING
lyrics:
1. Juhlo Bangpii baichem hangna tamleile, Tchiikapyi Bangpii koilei lungsyi lungsetsa Sazyi pouryi tchiikali katu ngouni takle. Matumpii ranuloi tangle. He….. sazyi poumei gungkiih sanii Kamyi ngamtoi eilo. Lat….. majilonang kavai kitei, Sazyi pounado saagonglei.

2. Juhlo Bangpii baichem hangna tamleile, Koileitakle Bangpii mei kaleitang karam, Bangpiina sazyi pouryi tchiikali kaloiki Kangpii nang kadalam gongtang.

3. Juhlo Bangpii baichem hangna tamleile Ruina kumpii satingna dojong tutangle, Bangpiina sazyi pouryi tchiikali kaloiki Gohpfii bamki piwotangpo?

title: I MUST TELL JESUS
lyrics:
1. N'goh jeikaju tinglang kakkitei, I roinapii pungpei laktakle. Goh chiilung kamage kagong kaktei, Pumpii dato I kaangtang takle. Jesuda tamtang, Jesuda tamtang. Iroinapii pungpei laktakle. Jesuda tamtang, Jesuda tamtang. Jesu roinale jukapyi tei.

2. Gohmah kamage Jesuda tamtang, Tchiiha katipii kang kasangle. Ina Jesugo rata dichiina. Kachiih kanhiih tei gahtu tangle.

3. Kahemna gong katu tinglang kaktei, Keikapyipii Jesu mareile. Jesuda tamtang, Jesuda tamtang. Ahroinapii kahemgo ngamle.

4. Oh, sazyi pouna n'goh kahem kak, Gohlung tchiimage kalei kaktei, Jesuda tamtang Ahna tchiiha tang. Sazyipou hang godo ngambuile.

title: COME SOON
lyrics:
1. Pumpiina latleile sazyi pouryi meigo, Nang kadapei jaangpiina gongrou tangpo? Apfii teina akee kacheng teile. Kasangma kacheng teile gong vanglo. Juhlo kasangsa arhii myitakle, Kadajaang piina mahatsa bampo? Rachet katu kadou poisa gonglo. Gongmaji wolo ritutang takle.

2. Pumpiima rangii kamatei gotei fiilo, Kasangsa fiisa poiwolo meihangna, N'go pyitakle nang fiisa poilo, Kamyi gotei sei mvaisa fiilo.

3. Juhsakii sageiti teido pattakle, Goma teimahum dangtui mbeileipo Pumpii nga ngahtang karam tchiidaalo, Rangiima saryinat tei keiwolo.

title: THE SORROW LIFE
lyrics:
1. Chiilung ei magele ntahkatu gahle, Chiilung eina eikum takle, Teijaangpiina maziikasu tchiisulo, Teijaangpii satinggam pihtangle. Teikido nang kadaki leipo tampyilo, Nang satinggam sazyi timakpo? Jesuna latkalei teinang shiimakpo? Keekamtei gojaangpii latpyitang.

2. Kee kalung magetei daki leipo timak, Ina kemki kabamkak tei, Jesuna tamle kem gahpyi tanglesa, Teijaangpii satinggam pitangle.

3. Kanghemei malummak kabisam tamkido Gojaangpii satinggam bamlei, Sanapii kadaa tchiipyi kabamni tei, Kasuisa satinggam pihtangle.

title: I HAVE DECIDED TO FOLLOW JESUS
lyrics:
1. Ina satto takle, Jesu teisuinesa (3 times) Nlei lakle, nringlakle.

2. Ina satto takle, kabisam tamnesa (3 times) Nlei lakle, nringlakle.

3. Ina satto takle, kabingam tchiinesa (3 times) Nlei lakle, nringlakle.

4. Ina satto takle, Bible tei fiinesa (3 times) Nlei lakle, nringlakle.

title: JESUS INVITE SINNER
lyrics:
1. Jesuna latlei kemkapung mei, Sara kashyitei suijao tangpo? Lungsyisa latlei gongnyi makpo? Lung kali dichii Ahna poipyi tang. Eitoi kalang suchii tinglang gah, Ahma samtam tei gonglei takle.

2. Khristana n'goh kalat kitei I heichii daziika ntah tang Sana sazyito lungni makpo?

3. Keekam latkalei kaktei gonglo Eitoi kasuna tinglang gahle, Keekamdo latpyi loikei lakle.

4. Satinggam sazyi tamwolakle, Satinggam bwika kachem piina, Ahgo poikatoi liitchii leile.

title: VISIT US OH GOD
lyrics:
1. He Pumpii nang nyida humpyilo He Pumpii nang nyida humpyilo. Tingnei leimik sekpii, Nyi sazyiki missionary Sazyi tchiipyilo Lungsyi pyilo Pumpii.

2. He Pumpii satoitei pyiloilo (2 times)

3. He Pumpii nyihanggo keipyilo (2 times)

4. He Pumpii nyigo toipyisulo (2 times)

5. He Pumpii nyigo kaleipyilo (2 times)

6. He Pumpii nyihanggo poipyilo (2 times)

title: SEND THE HOLY SPIRIT
lyrics:
1. Eitoi rangiimatei maangpyilo, Eitoi rangiimatei maangpyilo, I na mangsa kaleiki rangii maangpyilo, Eitoi rangiimatei maangpyilo.

2. Eitoi rangiimatei maangpyilo, Eitoi rangiimatei maangpyilo, I kasoi jaangpii rangiimatei maangpyilo. Eitoi rangiimatei maangpyilo.

3. Eitoi rangiimatei maangpyilo, Eitoi rangiimatei maangpyilo, I kasoi jaangpii ateimahum keipyilo, Eitoi rangiimatei maangpyilo.

title: VICTORY IN JESUS
lyrics:
1. Ina shiile kasagoi, sagoi kakipii rasamtei, Keipyi tangkaram jaangpiina, Calvaryto taipyile, Ina shiile kabitei, gohjaangpii zaihum kapyitei. Gohmah kashyi matum madum, zaipii syitoi pyile. Saryi kangam keikapyi, Jesu zhei paikito, Tchiimatei maikating, Azheipii lupyile, Ahna n'goh lungsyipyi, I Ahpou pungleile, Ahmah kating zaiteipii, saryitei ngamtakle.

2. Ina shiile kamadat bipyi kaluma sampoutei, Pee katuigo tat matule, mik kachet ngoumatu le, Ina latle lungkasyi, Jesu n'goh bimatulo, Jesuna tamsa keipyi le, N'goh ringmatule.

3. Ina shiile gohjaangpii, kee kabi kadaa tchiikabam, Ina ngoule karyi kuto, kabi sana puidi tei, Kamatei mei liitchiisa, kaipat kalu puidi kito. Ting neikana Ido saryi, kangam liitchii tangle.

title: THE BEAUTY OF OUR LAND
lyrics:
1. Nyina lungsa kalei sazyi bikile, Kanghego kasuisa ka ntahram, Tingboi hiipai ruinalat lungsyi kile, Mangei wolakle kanghena lungkalei ram. Hangdoito nyi sazyi bikile, Dwipii longmagui kalei Azang ningkam katong katuk, Ngoukabi tamwolak, Bangpiina tchiikapyi kamadat baichem, Bikile nyina lungkalei sating sazyi.

2. Makado tikasu peipou tinglangki, Sachii saryi kateihmei zhei dile, Kareikina kati kangoudo gahle, Sara kashyigo kasuisana lungtule.

3. Nyina lungkalei sazyi ei gahlakle. Tchiidaalo tingkum tinglang gahlei tak Pumpii tammatoisa Ahngam tchiitude. Bikile nyina lungkalei sating sazyi.

4. Nyina lungkalei sazyi ei maitingle, Jugongki ntah rangaa roinale, Pumpiina kalei kapyi nyi sazyi ei Meikanado poisa tchiimashyi wolakle.

title: WE WILL FOLLOW
lyrics:
1. Jesu puidi maji suisa lungtangle (3 times) Tingnei akoi shiilo, Nang lungtei sulo. Nang lungtei sulo, (4 times) Tingnei akoi shiilo, Nang lungtei sulo.

2. Jesutei suilo sazyi pouryi meihang (3 times) Tinglang naleitakle, Nang lungtei sulo.

3. Sara kashyigo maningkito patlo (3 times) Jesu latlei shiilo, Nang lungtei sulo.

4. Kem samou kiteito nangtat patwolo (3 times) N'go keipyitangle, Nang lungtei sulo.

5. Jesu teisui kasumei mage doutang (3 times) Nang suikalu tchiilo, Nang lungtei sulo.

title: THIS WORLD IS NOT MY HOME
lyrics:
1. Sazyi pouryi kiei tingnei karoinale, Gokee kasang teina sating gamto leile. Tinggamto rangii mateina kalat shiiki, Sazyi pouryi eito I lungsa leiroule. Pumpii, Pumpii nangna tisa leile, Satinggam pisuchii I dapei tchiitangpo? Sating gamrangii mateina kalat shiiki, Sazyi pouryi eito I lungsa leiroule.

2. Akang ahemeina n'goh koisa leitang, Pumpiina n'goh lungsyi pyitang malumle, Teipiinei leimiktei n'tah rangaatangle, Sazyi pouryi eito I lungsa leiroule.

3. Lungkasyi gohpwina n'goh koisa leitang, Ngoukabi ting gamki teipiwo takdichii, Daziika zang jyitang pwigo kadouwochii, Sazyi pouryi eito I lungsa leiroule.

4. Sating gam sazyitei kamalumei keetang, Ahnyi lii tchiitangle, Bangpii sagong doito, Katei kachiih gaatang leimik kagah tchiimak, Lungkasyi lii teipii tokryitang satinggam.

title: BEAUTIFUL STARS OF BETHLEHEM
lyrics:
1. Ngou kabi Bethlehem sageiti, Kamyi sumto vaipyi leile, Leimik kapat lamto kati kangou, Meigo puidi vaipyisa tatlei, Jesugo manaa kabamni; Bethlehem mah sageiti vaipyile. Oh, ngou kabi Bethlehem sagei, Taksupiina nyigo kasui pyile, Oh, nyi puidi hangki vaipyile, Kamatei bam ngou kasuta, Vaipyile Bethlehem mah sageiti.

2. Oh, ngou kabi sageiti kavai, Kati kangou meidoi reisa, Tinghum matang sazyi pouryi vaipyi, Kamatei bam doukasu tatei, Ngou kabi kavaitei pyitang, Bethlehem mah sageiti vaipyile.

3. Ngou kabi kasagaa sageiti, Koikapyi doukalu meihang, Karing sana pyihung tei doutangle, Kamatei sageiti tei Ahle, Jesuna kisa vaitangle; Bethlehem mah sageiti vaipyile.

title: EVERYBODY OUGHTTO KNOW
lyrics:
1. Meihangna Jesu tile, Meihangna Jesu tile, Meihangna Jesu tile, Pumpii tapo? Zang gamto laam kalei hiipai, Sageiting tangpwi Ahle, Atang kyarii Songdo kile, Meihangna Jesu tile.

2. Meihang Ahsam tamroilo, Meihang Ahsam tamroilo, Meihang Ahsam tamroilo, Pumpii Jesu.

3. Cross paryito kem jaangpii, Cross paryito kem jaangpii, Cross paryito kem jaangpii, Jesu taitak.

4. Meihang Jesu malumlo, Meihang Jesu malumlo, Meihang Jesu malumlo, Ahring loitak.

5. Meihang tchiidasa koilo, Meihang tchiidasa koilo, Meihang tchiidasa koilo, Ahgong loitang.

title: SINCE I WAS BORN
lyrics:
1. Lung kaliloi takle, (3 times) Lung kalitak mana loisa.

2. Ina katchii ngam teitchii loilakle, (3 times) Lung kalitak mana loisa.

3. Ina kashyi lairektei fiiloilak, (3 times) Lung kalitak mana loisa.

4. Malum kasungam teitchii loilakle, (3 times) Lung kalitak mana loisa.

5. Sara kashyigo maningloi lakle, (3 times) Lung kalitak mana loisa.

title: KUMBAYA
lyrics:
1. Gongpyilo Pumpii, gongpyilo. (3 times) Pumpii, gongpyilo.

2. Kangka lii tchiilei, gongpyilo. (3 times) Pumpii, gongpyilo.

3. Kangka ratalei, gongpyilo. (3 times) Pumpii, gongpyilo.

4. Koipyilo, Pumpii gongpyilo. (3 times) Pumpii, gongpyilo.

5. Nyihang koileile, gongpyilo. (3 times) Pumpii, gongpyilo.

title: GOD IS CALLINGYOU
lyrics:
1. He sazyimei nang damaning lei, Sazyi pouryi kahum kaktei, Go pumteina n'tahsa leido, Go rangii teina hatsa lei. Pumpiina golat leile Kalangsa toi nlei gonglo, Rangiina golat leile. Nang datchiisa gongrou tangpo?

2. Sazyi pouryi sesana songdo, Kati kangou teisong teido, Go rangiiteina meiting buile, Go rangii jaangpii tchiidaalo.

3. Tinglang teina gahgong leitakle, Nang golung ranutang karam, Rangii kapyi teina mareile, Pumpii gotei lukeiwolo.

4. Kalui piinei samtak piineitei, Go Chiilung ranutang karam, Nang kemkito bamsa leitangpo? Go chiilungtei kada kumtang.

title: JACOB’S LADDER
lyrics: Jacob taksoiki nyi tatlei, (3 times) Bangpii saryimei. Nyipeekaang sagoisa tatlei, (3 times) Bangpii saryimei. Kemmei Jesugo lungsyipo? (3 times) Bangpii saryimei.

title: KEM KAMAIPII RUMKALEI
lyrics:
1. Kem kamaipii rumkalei Gohkem pot matum Jesuna gahpyi Calvaryto taipyisa Ahnii tchiimateipyile Tchiimatei pyi eisanii Kamyi sumto kavaiki pangpat pyi Toina I madou supii Kalui gahsii lhung tangle.

2. Kem kapung mei matumpii Maning gong humde Ahnii taikapyi Lungset doukabui jangpii toina nyi ngam tchiitude.

3. Jesuna n’go koilei Manaloi wosa gohda gongliitlo Kalui tchiikasu keetei gojangpii tchiidai bamle.

title: ZANGLI ROKLI
lyrics:
1. Lung majung doumak zangli rokli Lung majung doumakle sazyi pouryi ei Nyi bam toi eisa nyi gong tune Kakem kahat tei nyi kadou lakle.

2. Nyina kalung ni tinghum kampii Gomneisa myi bung bungsa swi pat wolak Mage marii nyina kalung ni Kamong teipii gom neisa kalei kum

3. Rahet lungkasyi pii sating gam Mage marii katu tei kadou lakle Kanghe meido kamage doulak Kalui kagah tchii kasu bam kitei

4. Saram mahou kum jong wosanii Kasagoi sating gam nyi jongtuh tangle Calvary kum zang gamto goisa Nyi maadou kado nlei hum lakle

5. Kaset kagah ram sating gamtei Sazyi pougo majusa jongtu tangle Kasagoi sating gam jongtune Jesu go kasuisa lii tchii tangle.

title: JESUNA JERICHO KALIIT
lyrics:
1. Jesuna Jericho tat kaliit tinglang kak Mik kachet mei hangnina puidi kuto bamleile Mei moina tat kaliit koitei shiiwosa n'nhiile Patkalei ei kadaposa tam Ahnyina mpoudaka tamle Nazareth ki Jesu gongleile David naa sapii mpou Jesu N’goh lungsyi pyilo Doi karei meiteina Maliit sulosa tam

2. Jesuna shiitakle ahgo tei pang gonglo Bangpiina ahda pih manangsa mpougo nhiile Ina gojangpii kadapei tchiikapyi mareipo? Ahna tamle mik ngou matulo

3. Teito Jesuna tamle gomik ngou wolo Goma kamalum teipii n’go tchii mbipyi takle Bangpiina kamadat tchiikapyi tamsa tatleile Meihangna ngouwosa madatle.
